Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11847 0 0}That was so much fun! Very tanoshi![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}But... I thought we would be playing more traditional games?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11865 0 0}Like where you fly a kite? Takoage? Or spin a top like in komamawashi?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}Does no one play those games anymore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11888 0 0}{f 5 13 15 30 112}What!? You only play these games on New Year's? I did not know...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 1 25 25}But now I have learned something new about Japan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe looks at me with admiration.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 3 25 25}That is so sad... Yet another Japanese tradition lost to time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe looks disappointed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11886 0 0}{f 5 13 15 15 112}You are not sure either, {f 4 2}-dono? Then perhaps the tradition has died out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}It is so sad to see Japanese traditions fade away and disappear like that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 1 25 25}I will take part in them at once! That way, everyone can see how great these traditions are![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe seems determined.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}But... now that I think about it, the games in the arcade were all made in Japan as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 4 25 25}Meaning they are also games of Japan... Perhaps they are even new Japanese traditions![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11900 0 0}To think it took me this long to realize that... I must go back and confirm this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After we were done playing arcade games,[n]I decided to head back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
